summary: End-to-end testing of CMS Edu AI auth + LMS stubs. Backend pytest: 24/25 passing. Frontend: all key flows (3-role login, register, forgot/reset, RBAC redirect, dashboards, sidebar collapse, session persistence, logout) work via Bearer-token auth. Two issues found.

minor.issue: Brute-force lockout never triggers behind k8s ingress. Lockout key is `request.client.host:email`, but Cloudflare/ingress proxies rotate request.client.host across pods, so attempts never accumulate. 7 wrong attempts all returned 401, never 429. Fix: key lockout on email alone (or honor X-Forwarded-For) so the threshold is reachable in proxy environments.

ui_bugs.issue: Body text scan did not contain the word 'role' in any case — role dropdown label may be missing/hidden. Verify role select is visible & labeled per requirement: 'role dropdown lets user pick'.

At 390x844 viewport, clicking [data-testid=topbar-burger] does not open [data-testid=sidebar-mobile]. Drawer state not toggling on mobile. Check that DashboardLayout passes mobileOpen state from Topbar burger to Sidebar.

Many console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Charts ultimately render, but parent container has 0 height on first paint. Add explicit min-height to chart wrapper div.

passed_flows: Login selection page shows 3 role cards with correct testids
Demo-fill button + submit logs in for admin/instructor/student
Bearer token persists in localStorage across hard refresh (session persistence)
Topbar profile dropdown -> Logout clears token, redirects to /login
After logout, visiting /admin/dashboard correctly bounces to /login
Student accessing /admin/dashboard redirected to /unauthorized with Back/Sign out buttons
Sidebar collapse + expand work via testids sidebar-collapse-button / sidebar-expand-button
Admin Users page (/admin/users) renders seeded users including admin@cmsedu.ai
Forgot password page returns dev_token panel; reset flow updates password (backend test confirms login succeeds with new password)
Student dashboard shows streak (14 days), XP progress (4280/5000), badges, weekly chart, leaderboard
action_items: Backend: Make brute-force lockout proxy-safe — key on email only, or trust X-Forwarded-For for IP.
Frontend: Verify /register page exposes a Role select/dropdown with label visible (testid recommended: register-role-select).
Frontend: Fix mobile sidebar drawer — burger button click must set sidebar mobileOpen=true so [data-testid=sidebar-mobile] becomes visible at 390px viewport.
Frontend (cosmetic): Wrap Recharts ResponsiveContainer in a div with explicit height to silence width(-1)/height(-1) warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 245: `create_refresh_token(...) if payload.remember else create_refresh_token(...)` — both branches identical, ternary is dead code. Either differentiate token TTL by remember or remove the conditional.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup') — should migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.95).
auth lockout uses `request.client.host` which is unreliable behind any reverse proxy / k8s ingress (this caused our test failure). Production needs trusted proxy header parsing.

/api/auth/forgot-password returns the reset token in the response body (`dev_token`). This is fine for dev but MUST be gated behind an env flag (e.g. ENV=dev) before production — currently it leaks reset tokens to anyone who knows a registered email.
Many sample dashboard numbers (revenue, KPIs) are hardcoded in route handlers — fine for stub but mark as TODO for real aggregation.
CORS uses `allow_origin_regex=r'https?://.*'` with `allow_credentials=True` — effectively reflects any origin. Tighten to known preview/prod hosts before launch.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (key flows pass; mobile drawer + register role label flagged)

test_credentials: admin@cmsedu.ai / Demo@123, instructor@cmsedu.ai / Demo@123, student@cmsedu.ai / Demo@123 — all verified working
seed_data_creation: Tests create transient TEST users via /api/auth/register (random hex emails) for register/forgot/lockout cases. Not cleaned up but isolated by random emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use BASE_URL=https://role-auth-3.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env). All backend auth uses Bearer header (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). /api/auth/refresh requires httpOnly refresh_token cookie which doesn't survive cross-origin preview — skip it. Frontend testids: role-card-{role}, login-fill-demo, login-submit-button, sidebar-collapse-button, sidebar-expand-button, topbar-profile-trigger, topbar-menu-logout, topbar-burger, sidebar-mobile, sidebar-mobile-close. Re-run pytest with: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_auth_lms.py -v.
rca of the issue: Lockout RCA: backend/server.py L227 `ip = request.client.host` — under k8s ingress this returns the immediate hop (often varying ingress pod IP or the LB pod), so identifier `ip:email` differs across requests. The login_attempts collection accumulates separate counters per IP, never reaching threshold 5. Mitigation: extract client IP from `X-Forwarded-For` header (first entry) when behind a trusted proxy, or simply key the lockout by email only (still rate-limited per account).
